subject: test(pwa): +23 tests for injector script, visibility handler, disclosure
body:
Three test suites cover all the new PWA infrastructure from this branch:

1. scripts/__tests__/inject-icon-hashes.test.ts (6 tests): integration
   tests that shell out to the real .mjs script against a temp-dir
   fixture with real icon bytes. Covers happy path, idempotent re-run,
   hash refresh when icon bytes change, fail-loud on missing SW literal,
   missing-precached-icon error, HTML format-drift warn. jest.config
   roots expanded to include scripts/__tests__/.

2. src/hooks/__tests__/usePWAUpdate.test.ts (11 tests): unit tests for
   the visibility-aware polling helpers via a new __testing export on
   usePWAUpdate. Exposes handleVisibilityChange, start/stopUpdateInterval,
   checkForUpdate, plus reset/setRegistration hooks so tests can run in
   isolation. Covers idempotent start/stop, correct clearInterval handle,
   null-registration safety, async-rejection swallowing, hidden/visible/
   prerender transitions, and a full visible→hidden→visible roundtrip.

3. src/components/pwa/__tests__/IconCacheDisclosure.test.tsx (6 tests):
   react-test-renderer-based tests for the extracted disclosure. Covers
   collapsed initial state (body text absent), press-to-expand (caret
   flip + accessibilityState.expanded update + body text present), press
   roundtrip to collapse, color prop propagation, hitSlop WCAG target,
   and SR-hidden caret (importantForAccessibility + accessibilityElementsHidden).

Tags: testing, pwa, hooks, a11y
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-polish
Semver: patch
